gui.bannermod.workers.command.tooltip.re: Detiene a los trabajadores seleccionados, limpia su tarea activa y te devuelve el control.
description.bannermod.workers.farmer: Planta cultivos usando semillas del almacén cercano y cosecha los campos cuando están listos. Trabaja automáticamente en las tierras de cultivo dentro del rango y mantiene los cultivos creciendo eficientemente.
description.bannermod.workers.miner: Mina un área definida y coloca antorchas mientras trabaja. Garantiza la seguridad rellenando los agujeros con adoquines y puede opcionalmente cubrir el suelo para evitar caídas peligrosas.
description.bannermod.workers.lumberjack: Tala árboles dentro de un área maderera y puede pelar troncos o replantar plántulas cuando se le indica. Mantiene los bosques gestionados y renovables.
description.bannermod.workers.builder: Construye estructuras guardadas bloque a bloque y requiere todos los materiales necesarios. Recoge recursos del depósito más cercano antes de comenzar la construcción.
description.bannermod.workers.merchant: Comercia con otros jugadores en tu nombre usando ofertas comerciales predefinidas. Puede tomar los objetos necesarios de un depósito dedicado si está permitido.
description.bannermod.workers.fisherman: Usa una caña de pescar en un área de pesca definida y lanza el sedal a lo largo de una ruta establecida. Recoge los peces y objetos cercanos, los almacena en un depósito cercano y cuida la caña para prolongar su durabilidad.
description.bannermod.workers.animalFarm: Cuida a los animales en corrales definidos. Cría a los animales de forma más rápida y eficiente.
chat.bannermod.workers.text.merchantNoIt: %s: Ya no me queda %s, ¡me reabasteceré pronto desde un depósito cercano si es posible!
chat.bannermod.workers.text.merchantLimi: %s: Lo siento, he alcanzado el límite en este intercambio.
chat.bannermod.workers.text.merchantCust: %s: Lo siento, parece que no tienes suficiente espacio en tu inventario.
chat.bannermod.workers.text.merchantNoSp: %s: Lo siento, no me queda espacio.
%s: ¡Necesito más espacio de almacenamiento para seguir comerciando!

gui.recruits.command.tooltip.rest: Sets the area where your recruits are allowed to rest.

gui.recruits.command.tooltip.face: Make the formation face the direction you are looking at.
gui.recruits.command.tooltip.tight: Toggle tight formation spacing (50% closer together).

gui.recruits.command.tooltip.fire_at_wil: Enable the use of Ranged weapons.
gui.recruits.command.tooltip.hold_strate: Stop the ongoing strategic fire command.

gui.recruits.command.tooltip.neutral: Make the recruits attack only hostile living.
gui.recruits.command.tooltip.aggressive: Make the recruits attack all enemy players and recruits on sight.
gui.recruits.command.tooltip.raid: Make the recruits attack all living on sight.

description.recruits.recruit:
The Recruit is a important warrior who relies only on melee weapons.
Swift on his feet and able to carry a shield, he can adapt to many situations.
Though simple in training, he is reliable in almost every kind of fight.
description.recruits.shieldman:
The Shieldman is a steadfast defender.
Armed only with melee weapons, he excels with the shield, blocking attacks with shorter recovery time.
Though his steps are slower, his endurance and health make him well-suited for long, grinding battles.
description.recruits.bowman:
The Bowman is a fast and accurate archer, striking enemies from a distance with precision shots.
When needed, he can draw a sword to defend himself in close combat.
However, he cannot carry a shield and has no skill with the crossbow.
description.recruits.crossbowman:
The Crossbowman is a disciplined ranged fighter, delivering powerful and precise bolts even at long range.
His shots are fast, and they hit hard and true.
If needed, he can wield a sword in close quarters, but he cannot carry shields or use bows.
description.recruits.horseman:
The Horseman is a mounted warrior who charges fearlessly into enemy lines.
In free wander mode, his horse charge scatters and knocks back enemies, breaking their ranks.
He can fight with melee weapons and shields, making him both strong in defense and devastating in attack.
description.recruits.nomad:
The Nomad is a skilled rider and master of the bow.
In free wander mode, he circles his enemies on horseback, loosing arrows while avoiding their attacks.
Agile and elusive, he fights with the bow and sword, striking swiftly before retreating again into motion.
description.recruits.scout:
The Scout is a fast and watchful companion.
He can spot enemies when they come into view and give clear information about their numbers and strength.
In battle, he can fight with a bow from range or with a sword in close combat.
description.recruits.messenger:
The Messenger is a companion of peace.
He can send messages or treaties to faraway players or factions and, if needed, carry a gift in his hand.
Though skilled with sword and bow, he cannot be harmed while on a mission, for his duty to protect diplomacy.
description.recruits.captain:
The Captain is master of the ship.
He can sail to chosen places and take command of the cannons on board.
His shots are precise against enemy ships and can also strike targets on land.
In close battle, he fights well with sword and shield.
description.recruits.commander:
The Commander is a strong leader.
He can patrol chosen positions and guide a group of recruits, leading them from point to point.
With him at the front, his men move with order and strength.
description.recruits.peaceTreaty: When accepting this treaty both factions cannot attack each other for the duration.
chat.recruits.text.messenger_target_play: %s: I arrived, but %s did not accept our treaty proposal.
chat.recruits.text.messenger_info_to_tar: %s: I have a important proposal from %s
